name: FN57 | 铜色星系
collection: 军火交易 3 号收藏品
collectionZh: 军火交易 3 号收藏品
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. It has been painted with metal flake paint. Stars are just pin pricks at the darkness
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 这把武器使用金属鳞片涂料进行了涂装。 星星只是夜空中的点缀
